overall.description: A first-person perspective from a cyberpunk street food stall during a rainy night. The scene features heavy rainfall, atmospheric fog, and prominent yellow neon lighting overhead, with pedestrians walking past cooking grills. The high-fidelity rendering and aesthetic indicate this is game engine footage, likely from a futuristic open-world game.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night at a covered street food stall illuminated by intense yellow neon overhead lights. A metal cooking grill sits in the foreground while a seated customer eats near a glass railing overlooking the rainy cityscape below. Sparse pedestrians walk through the misty atmosphere as steam rises from the cooking area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street food stall with arcade machine and digital signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing distinctive red pants walking past the arcade machine

entered.detail: illuminated arcade cabinet with glowing colorful screen and control panels
bright digital billboards and neon advertisements visible in the background

segments.scene_description: As the camera slowly pans right, an illuminated arcade machine comes into view on the right side of the frame, displaying colorful game graphics. A pedestrian in red pants walks past the machine while the yellow neon lights continue to dominate the ceiling. The glass railing shifts to the left edge of the frame as the view transitions toward the interior arcade area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy street food stall into the colorful glow of a nearby arcade area. It begins under intense yellow neon lights, focusing on a metal cooking grill and a seated customer eating beside a glass railing that overlooks a misty, rain-soaked cityscape. As the camera slowly pans right, the steam from the cooking area gives way to the vibrant graphics of an illuminated arcade machine. A pedestrian in red pants walks past this machine while the yellow ceiling lights remain constant, shifting the glass railing to the edge of the frame. The scene finally expands further into the interior arcade space, transitioning from the open-air food stall to the enclosed gaming environment.
